compiled_state.title: [af9e-77fc] GREEN: Implement scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py at repo root
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## What to do
Create scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py at the REPO ROOT (NOT under plugins/dso/). This script migrates all plugins/dso references in .sh code lines.

## Operations

### 1. inject
For .sh files lacking _PLUGIN_ROOT= that have plugins/dso in code lines: insert _PLUGIN_ROOT declaration after shebang (or after set -e/set -euo pipefail if on line 2).

### 2. replace_variable_anchored
Non-comment lines with $REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso/, $_root/plugins/dso/, $DIST_ROOT/plugins/dso/ → ${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/
Also: ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso} → ${_PLUGIN_ROOT}; */plugins/dso/* patterns → */${_PLUGIN_GIT_PATH}/*

### 3. derive_and_replace_git_relative
For scripts using git show, git diff, case patterns with bare plugins/dso/:
- Add _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH="${_PLUGIN_ROOT#$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/}" derivation
- Replace bare plugins/dso/ with ${_PLUGIN_GIT_PATH}/

### 4. replace_user_messages
echo/printf lines containing plugins/dso → use ${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/ instead

### 5. update_config
- plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/plugin-boundary-allowlist.conf: rewrite comments
- plugins/dso/docs/workflow-config-schema.json: replace example with generic paths

## CLI
python3 scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py [--dry-run] [--verbose] <target_dir>

## Constraints
- Only modify non-comment code lines in .sh files
- Idempotent
- Script lives at repo root, NOT under plugins/dso/

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py exists at repo root
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py
- [ ] All 9+ unit tests pass GREEN
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test-migrate-runtime-refs.py -v
- [ ] --dry-run flag works
  Verify: python3 scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py --dry-run plugins/dso/ 2>&1 | grep -q "would"
